---
title: "Themes"
description: "Install and preview the terminal themes shipped with the registry."
---

<TerminalPreview>
  <ThemeShowcasePreview />
</TerminalPreview>

## Available Themes

- **Default**: `npx shadcn@latest add https://termcn.vercel.app/r/theme-default.json`
- **Dracula**: `npx shadcn@latest add https://termcn.vercel.app/r/theme-dracula.json`
- **Nord**: `npx shadcn@latest add https://termcn.vercel.app/r/theme-nord.json`
- **Catppuccin**: `npx shadcn@latest add https://termcn.vercel.app/r/theme-catppuccin.json`
- **Monokai**: `npx shadcn@latest add https://termcn.vercel.app/r/theme-monokai.json`
- **Solarized**: `npx shadcn@latest add https://termcn.vercel.app/r/theme-solarized.json`
- **Tokyo Night**: `npx shadcn@latest add https://termcn.vercel.app/r/theme-tokyo-night.json`
- **One Dark**: `npx shadcn@latest add https://termcn.vercel.app/r/theme-one-dark.json`
- **High Contrast**: `npx shadcn@latest add https://termcn.vercel.app/r/theme-high-contrast.json`

## Using a Theme

```tsx
import { ThemeProvider } from "@/components/ui/theme-provider";
import { draculaTheme } from "@/lib/terminal-themes/dracula";
import { Badge } from "@/components/ui/badge";

export function Example() {
  return (
    <ThemeProvider theme={draculaTheme}>
      <Badge variant="success">Ready</Badge>
    </ThemeProvider>
  );
}
```

Theme items install the theme file into `lib/terminal-themes/` and rely on the `theme-provider` registry dependency automatically.
